#  Disconnect an Equipment Telematics Connection 
##  Background 
In the company's Equipment tool settings, you can connect your equipment telematics so that they can be viewed in the Equipment tool in Procore. You can disconnect telematics at any time.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/equipment-company/permissions)
  * After telematics have been disconnected, the last readings remain available in the 'Telematics' tab of the equipment details. See [View Equipment Details in the Company Equipment Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/equipment-company/tutorials/view-equipment-details-in-the-company-equipment-tool).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the company's **Equipment** tool.
  2. Click the **configure settings** ![Icon Settings Gear Grey3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/6649669377546a67a1cc36afbe2e5bbf/2b17fe103fb52d67228f09a9458adfd7/icon-settings-gear-grey3.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Click the **Telematics Connections** tab.
  4. Click the **vertical ellipsis** ![Icon Ellipsis Vertical](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b6d0fa56ca6a66941a4032499f56aec8/2bb6315cb1db00c907bda1e2ae7a081c/icon-vertical-ellipsis.png?fm=webp&h=15) for the telematics connection you want to disconnect.
  5. Click **Disconnect**.


## See Also
  * [Configure Equipment Telematics Connection for John Deere](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/equipment-company/tutorials/configure-equipment-telematics-connection-for-john-deere)
  * [Configure Equipment Telematics Connection for Caterpillar](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/equipment-company/tutorials/configure-equipment-telematics-connection-for-caterpillar)
  * [Configure Equipment Telematics Connection for Samsara](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/equipment-company/tutorials/configure-equipment-telematics-connection-for-samsara)
title: Disconnect an Equipment Telematics Connection
description: How to disconnect a telematics connection in the company's Equipment tool.
